description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has four jobs: linux-os, windows-os, macOS, and iOS-Simulator. The linux-os job runs on ubuntu-20.04, updates APT, installs dependencies, checks out repositories, builds an AppImage, and uploads it as an artifact. The windows-os job runs on windows-latest with a matrix strategy for different platforms and installations, clones repositories, sets up Vulkan SDK, downloads and extracts ANGLE, configures and installs the project, and uploads artifacts. The macOS and iOS-Simulator jobs run on macos-latest, clone dependencies, build and export archives, and upload them as artifacts.
